title: cymbidium × gammieanum
intro: Cymbidium × gammieanum, a hybrid orchid plant, is a cross between Cymbidium goeringii and Cymbidium lancifolium. Cymbidium × gammieanum is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to lower blood pressure and act as a diuretic, making it useful in treating conditions such as hypertension and urinary retention. The plant is rich in flavonoids and other bioactive compounds, which contribute to its health benefits, including antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects, as well as its potential to improve cardiovascular health. Cymbidium × gammieanum is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often consumed to leverage its medicinal and health benefits.
